title: Proxy Configuration
description: Configuration schema for the oh-my-opencode proxy server with load balancing support

version.description: Configuration schema version, currently fixed at 1

port.description: Port number for the proxy server to listen on

id.description: Unique identifier for this upstream (optional, auto-generated if not provided)

model.description: Model name to use from this provider

baseURL.description: Custom base URL for the provider API (optional)

apiKey.description: API key for authentication (optional, can be null)

weight.description: Weight for weighted load balancing strategy (positive number)

timeSlotWeights.description: Time-slot weight configuration for cost control. When configured, replaces upstream.weight based on current time slot.

upstream.description: Upstream configuration representing a backend model provider

enabled.description: Enable or disable dynamic weight adjustment based on latency

initialWeight.description: Initial weight value for new upstreams

minWeight.description: Minimum weight value to prevent complete traffic cutoff

checkInterval.description: Interval in seconds between weight adjustment checks

latencyThreshold.description: Latency multiplier threshold above which weight is reduced

recoveryInterval.description: Interval in milliseconds between weight recovery steps

recoveryAmount.description: Amount to increase weight during each recovery step

dynamicWeight.description: Dynamic weight adjustment configuration for latency-based load balancing

enabled.description: Enable or disable time-slot based weight adjustment

totalErrorThreshold.description: Total error rate threshold for triggering weight adjustment

dangerSlotThreshold.description: Error rate threshold for marking a time slot as dangerous

dangerMultiplier.description: Weight multiplier for dangerous time slots

normalMultiplier.description: Weight multiplier for normal time slots

lookbackDays.description: Number of days to look back for error rate calculation

timeSlotWeight.description: Time-slot based weight adjustment configuration for historical error patterns

strategy.description: Load balancing strategy: sticky (会话粘滞). Note: Old strategies (round-robin, random, weighted) are accepted for backward compatibility but silently convert to sticky.

upstreams.description: List of upstream providers for this route

route.description: Route configuration defining a virtual model and its upstreams

routes.description: Map of route names to route configurations. Route names become virtual model names.

name.description: Human-readable name for this API key

enabled.description: Whether this API key is currently active

authKey.description: Single API key configuration for proxy authentication

enabled.description: Enable or disable API key authentication for the proxy

keys.description: List of API keys for authentication

auth.description: Authentication configuration for the proxy server

allowedFails.description: Consecutive failures before tripping circuit breaker

reliability.description: Reliability configuration for circuit breaker and failure handling
